creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
Both multimedia/webcamd and multimedia/pwcbsd install /usr/local/man/man4/pwc.4.gz
This leads to checksum error in the former installed package (pkg_info -g).

How-To-Repeat: Install both webcamd and pwcbsd

# pkg_info -W /usr/local/man/man4/pwc.4.gz
pkg_info: both pwcbsd-1.4.1_9 and webcamd-3.6.0.1_1 claim to have installed /usr/local/man/man4/pwc.4.gz

/usr/local/man/man4/pwc.4.gz was installed by package pwcbsd-1.4.1_9


# pkg_info -xgQ webcamd
webcamd-3.6.0.1_1:/usr/local/man/man4/pwc.4.gz fails the original MD5 checksum
